headline: JPMorgan Upgrades IBM on Stronger Software Growth Expectations
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is included among the Top 10 Blue Chip Stocks with Growing Dividends. On June 23, JPMorgan upgraded International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) to Overweight from Neutral. It also raised its price target on the stock to $291 from $270. The upgrade follows the firm’s analysis of IBM’s software business, which […]

headline: IBM Debuts World's First Sub-1 Nanometer Chip Technology
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) today unveiled a major semiconductor breakthrough with the introduction of the world's first sub-1 nanometer (nm) chip technology, featuring a revolutionary transistor architecture at the 0.7 nm, or 7 angstrom node. The achievement marks a landmark moment for an industry facing the physical limits of traditional chip scaling. Semiconductors play critical roles in everything from computing, to appliances, to communication devices, transportation systems, and critical infrastructur
